TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Sansaru ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Gpho go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 45 buwan, 128 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 91% kyan ku 116 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 9% kyan ku 12 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 85%, saySiyat 3%, Amis 2%, Paywan 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Sansaru hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Sansaru hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Sansaru hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Sansaru hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Sansaru hya' ga Heku'. tay mkyahu' na Sansaru hya' ga Skaru. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ s~ɕans~ɕaru ɣa nija mki s~ɕku s~ɕinʦ~ʨik keŋ atu ɣpħo ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, s~ɕajs~ɕijat *%, amis~ɕ *%, pajwan *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ru kjokaj. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na s~ɕans~ɕaru ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na s~ɕans~ɕaru ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕans~ɕaru ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕans~ɕaru ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕans~ɕaru ħjaʔ ɣa ħekuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕans~ɕaru ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕkaru. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Sansaru ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Gpho go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 45 buwan, 128 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 91% kyan ku 116 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 9% kyan ku 12 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 85%, saySiyat 3%, Amis 2%, Paywan 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Sansaru hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Sansaru hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Sansaru hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Sansaru hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Sansaru hya' ga Heku'. tay mkyahu' na Sansaru hya' ga Skaru. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ s~ɕans~ɕaru ɣa nija mki s~ɕku s~ɕinʦ~ʨik keŋ atu ɣpħo ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, s~ɕajs~ɕijat *%, amis~ɕ *%, pajwan *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ru kjokaj. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na s~ɕans~ɕaru ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na s~ɕans~ɕaru ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕans~ɕaru ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕans~ɕaru ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕans~ɕaru ħjaʔ ɣa ħekuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕans~ɕaru ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕkaru. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
